data.title: Coding Agent Development
data.description: Develop robust backbone and pipeline for the coding agent. Target release: Thursday.

data.title: Agent Quality & Scheduled Jobs
data.description: Improve scheduled jobs reliability and fix chat streaming bugs. Run collaborative bug bash.

data.title: UX/UI Refinements & Bug Fixes
data.description: Refine Ollie interface elements, resolve reported UI bugs, and align spacing/padding constraints.

data.title: Data Privacy & Security Audit
data.description: Perform thorough data privacy audit before teamfood release. Coordinate with Zhengrong Ji for Director+ permissions.

data.title: In-Person Co-Design Sessions
data.description: Conduct 90-minute in-person interviews at the Google NYC Office to map real-world workflows and data trails.

data.title: Define GCP Prototype Testing Process
data.description: Set up the environment for users to test the Google Cloud Platform prototype with their active Workspace accounts.
